hero.title: Scaling Data Maturity for Growth
hero.subtitle: Guiding a series-B startup from fragmented spreadsheets to a centralized Snowflake-based data warehouse in under 90 days.

executiveSummary: A rapidly growing fintech startup hit a ceiling with spreadsheets and disparate data sources. We built a scalable data foundation that supported their next phase of growth.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: Rapid growth exposed data infrastructure limitations. Teams couldn't get timely answers, and executives lacked reliable dashboards for decision-making.

items.text: Critical business metrics scattered across 15+ spreadsheets.
No single source of truth for revenue reporting.
Manual reporting took 3 days each month.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.description: A cloud-native data stack with automated pipelines and self-service analytics for the entire organization.

features.title: Snowflake Data Warehouse
features.description: Scalable cloud warehouse with automated ETL workflows.

features.title: Self-Service Analytics
features.description: BI dashboards with row-level security for 200+ users.

technicalSpotlight.title: Speed & Reliability
technicalSpotlight.quote: We went from spreadsheet chaos to data-driven decisions overnight.

testimonial.quote: Datamore delivered what we thought would take 6 months in just 90 days. Our Series-C fundraising was powered by real-time metrics.
testimonial.author: Alex Rodriguez
testimonial.title: Head of Data, Series-B Fintech

cta.title: Accelerate your growth with data infrastructure
cta.subtitle: Build a scalable foundation for your startup's next milestone.
